news.headline: BioNTech reveals 2024 financial results plus corporate update.
news.summary: The latest data reveals that there has been a significant increase in the number of COVID-19 cases in the past week. Over 10,000 new cases were reported, bringing the total number of cases to more than 150,000. Hospitalizations have also risen, with over 1,500 people currently being treated for the virus. The rise in cases has prompted local officials to implement stricter safety measures, including mandatory mask-wearing in public spaces and limits on gatherings. Experts are urging the public to follow guidelines to curb the spread of the virus and avoid overwhelming the healthcare system.

news.headline: UK Foreign Minister Lammy: We are concerned by dangerous and destabilising activities by China in the South China Sea
Protalix BioTherapeutics (PLX) to announce FY 2024 results on March 17, 2025, in CARMIEL. Conference call at 8:30 a.m. EDT.
news.summary: Protalix BioTherapeutics, Inc., a biopharmaceutical company specializing in the development, production, and commercialization of recombinant therapeutic proteins, will be conducting a conference call and webcast on March 10, 2025, at 8:30 a.m. EDT. The company, listed on NYSE American as PLX, is based in Carmiel, Israel. This event is crucial for stakeholders and investors.

news.headline: Primo Brands to offer 45,000,000 shares of Class A Common Stock in secondary offering by One Rock Capital affiliate.
news.summary: In Tampa, Florida and Stamford, Connecticut on March 10, 2025, Primo Brands Corporation (NYSE: PRMB) revealed that a major shareholder, affiliated with One Rock Capital Partners, is planning to sell a significant number of shares in the company.

news.headline: Timken to attend BofA Industrials Conf in London on Mar 18, 2025. Leader in engineered bearings & industrial motion.
news.summary: North Canton, Ohio-based The Timken Company, a prominent global player in engineered bearings and industrial motion, is set to attend the BofA Global Research Global Industrials Conference in London on March 18, 2025. Traded on NYSE as TKR and known for their technological expertise, the company's participation in the event underscores its commitment to industry engagement.

news.headline: Unichain and Berachain dominate blockchain growth recently with Uniswap L2 leading DEX volume, ranking third industry-wide in past month.
news.summary: In the last month, the decentralized exchange (DEX) volume of Uniswap L2 Unichain has ranked as the third-highest in the industry. This data comes from Nansen, showcasing the substantial activity within the platform.

news.headline: Sergio Letelier appointed as Senior VP, Corporate Development, Planning, and Strategy at Eaton (NYSE:ETN) effective March 17, 2025.
news.summary: In Dublin today, Eaton (NYSE:ETN), an intelligent power management company, revealed the appointment of Sergio Letelier as senior vice president for corporate development, planning, and strategy, starting March 17, 2025. Letelier will oversee Eaton's corporate strategy and global mergers and acquisitions under the guidance of Olivier Leonetti, the executive vice president and CFO. He will also become a part of the company's executive leadership team.

news.headline: Kelun-Biotech's sac-TMT approved by NMPA for EGFRm NSCLC, second indication for TROP2 ADC; significant development.
news.summary: In Chengdu, China on March 10, 2025, Sichuan Kelun-Biotech Biopharmaceutical Co., Ltd. made an announcement regarding their trophoblast cell-surface antigen 2 (TROP2)-directed antibody-drug conjugate (ADC) known as sacituzumab tirumotecan (sac-TMT, previously named SKB264/MK-2870). The company revealed that this drug has shown promising results in clinical trials.

news.headline: Shoulder Innovations secures $40M in Series E financing led by USVP, for shoulder replacement technology.
news.summary: Shoulder Innovations, a prominent player in shoulder replacement technology, recently finalized a Series E equity financing round in Grand Rapids, Michigan on March 10, 2025. The company successfully secured $40 million in funding, with U.S. Venture Partners (USVP), an existing investor, taking the lead on the financing. This new round of funding is expected to further propel the growth and development of Shoulder Innovations in the field of shoulder replacement technology.

news.headline: Robert Musslewhite and Sudhakar Ramakrishna to join Cardinal Health Board of Directors. Robert is former CEO of Definitive Healthcare Corp and Sudhakar is President and CEO of SolarWinds.
news.summary: Dublin, Ohio - On March 10, 2025, Cardinal Health (NYSE: CAH) revealed that Robert Musslewhite, ex-CEO of Definitive Healthcare Corp., and Sudhakar Ramakrishna, President and CEO of SolarWinds, have been elected to the company's Board of Directors.

news.headline: Cryptocurrency companies invested $134M in the 2024 US elections, sparking worries about their influence on regulations.
news.summary: Certain experts in the industry believe that political contributions play a significant role in achieving greater regulatory transparency in the realm of cryptocurrencies. By making financial contributions to political entities, companies and supporters can potentially influence policy development and interactions with regulatory bodies. This belief stems from the understanding that such contributions can pave the way for clearer guidelines and frameworks in the rapidly evolving crypto space. These donations are seen as a strategic investment towards shaping the future landscape of cryptocurrency regulation.

news.headline: Bitcoin's 'Monte Carlo' model predicts a $713K peak in 6 months, with a price range of $51,430 to $713,000 by Sept 2025.
news.summary: A statistical analysis has revealed a wide price range forecast for Bitcoin, spanning from $51,430 to $713,000, with an average target of $258,445 by September 2025.

news.headline: Artist Vonetta Rain releases memoir "The Shaman's Apprentice" on National Day of Rest for Black women in 2025, celebrating Harriet Tubman's legacy.
news.summary: On March 10, 2025, in Los Angeles, a National Day of Rest for Black women was announced to honor the legacy of Harriet Tubman. The day coincided with the release of Vonetta's memoir, The Shaman's Apprentice, which offers readers a chance to delve into a transformative journey of self-discovery. The memoir is set to make waves as it showcases Vonetta's remarkable story.

news.headline: Grinding Grade Black Silicon Carbide Market to hit USD 1,805M by 2035, growing at 4.3% CAGR, with $620M opportunity. North America market share: 35.6% in 2035, creating $207.8M opportunity. Shift towards sustainable practices mentioned.
news.summary: The grinding grade black silicon carbide market was valued at USD 1,138 million in 2024, with a projected growth at a CAGR of 4.3% between 2025 to 2035. The market is driven by demand from industries like automotive, aerospace, and electronics due to its efficiency and performance capabilities. This abrasive material is used for grinding, cutting, and polishing operations, providing exceptional surface finishes and longer tool life. Additionally, there is a growing emphasis on sustainable manufacturing practices, leading to increased demand for black silicon carbide. The market is expected to reach USD 1,805 million by 2035, with an absolute opportunity of USD 620 million during the forecast period. North America is anticipated to hold a significant market share of 35.6% in 2035, with an absolute opportunity of USD 207.8 million. Manufacturers are focusing on innovative products that are environmentally friendly while maintaining high quality standards.

news.headline: WEX Inc. to hold investor call on March 14, 2025 at 9:00 a.m. ET. CEO Melissa Smith will host. Event with questions from investors.
news.summary: The company WEX Inc. revealed that its Chair and CEO, Melissa Smith, will lead a conference call on Friday, March 14, 2025, at 9:00 a.m. ET. The call will be moderated by David Koning from Baird. Investors will have the chance to interact and address questions to the management during the call. A live webcast of the presentation will be accessible on the Investor Relations section of the Company’s website. WEX Inc. is listed on NYSE with the ticker symbol WEX, and is recognized as a global commerce platform streamlining business operations.

news.headline: CGD unveils 100kW+ tech with ICeGaN GaN to target $10B+ EV inverter market, simplifying design.
news.summary: In Cambridge, England, Cambridge GaN Devices (CGD) disclosed further information about their latest solution designed to target EV powertrain applications exceeding 100kW. This represents a significant market valued at more than $10 billion. The new technology, known as Combo ICeGaN®, integrates smart ICeGaN HEMT ICs with IGBTs (Insulated Gate Bipolar Transistors). CGD is a fabless semiconductor company focusing on energy-efficient GaN-based power devices that simplify the design and implementation of eco-friendly electronics. The company's innovative ICeGaN® gallium nitride (GaN) technology aims to make a substantial impact in the industry.

news.headline: ECB's Kazimir: The time to let our guard down hasn't yet come
ECB's Kazimir: Inflation risks remain tilted to the upside
Frontera reports net loss of $24.2M in 2024, $116.7M generated from operations. Achieved $424M in Operating EBITDA. 40,288 Boe/d annual production. Q4 average production 42,406 Boe/d.
news.summary: In 2024, the company reported a net loss of $24.2 million for the full year, while generating $116.7 million in income from operations. The operating EBITDA for the full year stood at $424 million. The company met all of its 2024 guidance metrics, including achieving an annual production of 40,288 barrels of oil equivalent per day. The average production for the fourth quarter of 2024 was 42,406 barrels of oil equivalent per day.

news.headline: Willis Lease Finance Corp. sees record revenues of $569.2 million and pre-tax income of $152.6 million in 2024.
news.summary: In Coconut Creek, Fla., on March 10, 2025, Willis Lease Finance Corporation (NASDAQ: WLFC) announced its financial results for the year ended December 31, 2024. The company achieved record annual total revenues amounting to $569.2 million, with pre-tax income reaching $152.6 million. Key revenue sources included aggregate core lease rent and maintenance reserve revenues, which hit an all-time high of $452.1 million, marking a significant 30.4% increase from $346.8 million in 2023. The rise was primarily fueled by robust core lease and maintenance revenues reflecting a strong aviation market.

news.headline: EQT reports early participation in exchange offers and consent solicitations for EQM Midstream Partners, LP notes.
news.summary: Pittsburgh-based EQT Corporation (NYSE: EQT) shared on March 10, 2025, that they have disclosed the initial outcomes of their recent offer to Qualified Holders for an exchange. This initiative involved EQT proposing options for exchanging holdings, marking a significant move by the Company.

news.headline: DarioHealth's 2024 revenue grew 32.9% to $27M from $20.4M in 2023, driven by B2B2C channel, with recurring revenues up 300%.
news.summary: In 2024, the total revenue for the year witnessed a significant surge of 32.9%, reaching $27.0 million compared to the $20.4 million revenue recorded in 2023. This growth in revenue can be attributed to the B2B2C channel, specifically involving employers and health plans. The recurring revenues observed a remarkable increase of 300% year over year, showcasing the strong momentum of the core business and its ability to attract and retain customers.

news.headline: Yum China appoints Adrian Ding as CFO, effective Mar 6, 2025. Ding replaces previous CFO.
news.summary: Yum China Holdings, Inc. recently disclosed the appointment of Adrian Ding as the Chief Financial Officer, a role he assumed on March 6, 2025. This decision comes following an extensive search process conducted by the company. Adrian Ding now holds the crucial position overseeing the financial operations of Yum China. The company trades under ticker symbols YUMC on the New York Stock Exchange and 9987 on the Hong Kong Stock Exchange.

news.headline: First Trimble Technology Outlet globally named as SMS Equipment, selling grade control solutions for Komatsu, BOMAG, and Takeuchi. - Trimble.
news.summary: A Canadian equipment dealer has started offering Trimble grade control solutions for Komatsu, BOMAG, and Takeuchi equipment. Trimble (Nasdaq: TRMB) made the announcement on March 10, 2025, naming SMS Equipment, Inc. as the inaugural Trimble Technology Outlet globally. This initiative marks an important step for Trimble, expanding its market reach through this partnership with the Canadian company. The collaboration brings Trimble's advanced grade control solutions to a wider customer base, enhancing efficiency and accuracy in construction and related industries.

news.headline: EQT Corporation announced early results of EQM Tender Offer; details revealed upcoming numbers on the offer.
news.summary: The recent update from EQT Corporation (NYSE: EQT) in Pittsburgh on March 10, 2025 revealed the preliminary outcomes of EQM Midstream Partners, LP's (EQM) ongoing tender offer, known as the EQM Tender Offer. The offer was previously announced and is a part of EQM's strategic initiatives. EQT Corporation and its subsidiaries are collectively referred to as the Company. Further information regarding specific numbers or terms of the tender offer was not disclosed in the provided text.

news.headline: TXNM Energy (NYSE:TXNM) to affirm 2025 earnings guidance in meetings with investors this week in Albuquerque, N.M.
news.summary: In Albuquerque, New Mexico, on March 10, 2025, TXNM Energy, Inc. (NYSE: TXNM) will be holding meetings with analysts and investors to discuss their ongoing earnings guidance for 2025. Management is set to confirm the company's consolidated earnings projections for the year during these discussions.

news.headline: nVent to acquire Avail Infrastructure Solutions' Electrical Products Group for $975 million, expanding their business.
news.summary: In London, nVent Electric plc (NYSE: NVT) has revealed plans to acquire Avail Infrastructure Solutions' Electrical Products Group for $975 million. The deal includes the enclosures, switchgear, and bus systems businesses. nVent is a prominent player in electrical connection and protection solutions on a global scale. The agreement, subject to standard adjustments, aims to expand nVent's offerings in infrastructure solutions through the addition of the Electrical Products Group's expertise.

news.headline: ECB's Kazimir: We must remain open minded on whether we cut rates or pause
ECB's Kazimir: Geopolitical and trade tensions add another layer of unpredictability
ECB's Kazimir: Looking for undeniable confirmation that disinflation will stay; tariffs historically slow growth and boost inflation
Novo Nordisk's REDEFINE 2 trial shows CagriSema's superior weight loss in 1,206 adults with obesity or overweight and type 2 diabetes.
news.summary: Today in Bagsværd, Denmark, Novo Nordisk released key findings from REDEFINE 2, part of the global REDEFINE initiative. This phase 3 study spanned 68 weeks and assessed the efficacy and safety of once-weekly subcutaneous CagriSema - a blend of cagrilintide (2.4 mg) and semaglutide (2.4 mg) - versus a placebo. The trial involved 1,206 participants with obesity or overweight alongside type 2 diabetes, boasting an average initial weight of 102 kg.

news.headline: Trump excluded Binance Coin and Litecoin from US crypto reserves, analysts point to China ties and privacy concerns. Top 6 coins included in reserves, but BNB Coin omitted due to its strong connections to China.
news.summary: The US has established a Strategic Bitcoin Reserve and Digital Asset Stockpile, including Ethereum, XRP, Cardano, and Solana. These cryptocurrencies were chosen for their high market capitalization. Notably, BNB Coin was excluded, with analysts citing US-China trade tensions due to Binance's Chinese ties as a reason. This move represents a shift in monetary policy and could impact other countries' approaches to cryptocurrencies. The full article can be found on Benzinga.com.

news.headline: Saudi's Zahid plans to resume discussions with Barloworld's shareholders for deal.
H World Group Limited will release Q4 and full-year 2024 financial results on March 20, 2025 (HK time).
news.summary: Singapore and Shanghai, March 10, 2025 - H World Group Limited, a prominent company in the global hotel industry, disclosed plans to unveil its unaudited financial outcomes for Q4 and FY 2024 on Thursday, March 20, 2025 (Hong Kong time). The report will be released post the trading hours of The Stock Exchange of Hong Kong Limited and before the U.S. market opens. H World Group Limited trades on NASDAQ under the ticker symbol HTHT and on HKEX as 1179.

news.headline: Japan's Ishiba: The government will compile steps to raise minimum wage
US to urge Ukraine for ceasefires at Saudi meeting; focuses on peace commitments.
Crypto ETPs face $876M outflows for 4th week in row, with total $4.75B over 4 weeks. YTD inflows dip to $2.6B - CoinShares.
news.summary: CoinShares reports that in the last four weeks, a total of $4.75 billion has been withdrawn, leading to a decrease in year-to-date inflows to $2.6 billion.

news.headline: Astrum Mobile partners with SWISSto12 for NEASTAR-1 satellite, a 5G NTN platform in Asia Pacific; GEO SmallSat HummingSat to be manufactured.
news.summary: In the Asia Pacific region, Astrum Mobile has chosen SWISSto12's GEO SmallSat HummingSat for NEASTAR-1. This marks the launch of the first Satellite-to-Device (S2D) platform for 5G NTN services in the region.

news.headline: Hikvision unveils next-gen ProAV ecosystem at ISLE 2025 in China, showcasing digital innovations.
news.summary: In Hangzhou, China, on March 10, 2025, Hikvision, known for innovation, presented cutting-edge ProAV technology at ISLE 2025, enhancing immersive experiences. This showcase underscores Hikvision's commitment to transforming professional audio-visual solutions. They aim to revolutionize the industry by pushing boundaries and setting new standards.

news.headline: Key Japanese government panel members call for vigilance to the risks of rising inflation hurting the economy
Synaptics introduces ultra-low-power SoC family for IoT with target market at ~$3.2 billion.
news.summary: The SYN461x has been designed for efficiency in power consumption, system integration, size, and speed to market, showcasing excellent rate-over-range capabilities and effortless interoperability. This technology is strategically positioned to tap into a market opportunity valued at approximately $3.2 billion.

news.headline: Global 4-Aminobenzoic Acid Market expected to reach USD 376.2 million by 2035, growing at 4.1% CAGR; demand fueled by pharmaceutical and cosmetic industries.
news.summary: The global 4-Aminobenzoic Acid Market is expected to reach USD 251.7 million in 2025 and grow at a CAGR of 4.1% to reach USD 376.2 million by 2035. The increased demand for pharmaceutical and cosmetic products is driving the market for 4-Aminobenzoic Acid, with PABA being utilized in synthesizing drugs like local anesthetics and folic acid. In the cosmetics industry, PABA is used in sunscreens for UV light absorption. Regions like Asia-Pacific, North America, and Europe are expected to see robust growth in demand for PABA from both sectors. Lifestyle changes and a growing focus on health and personal care are also contributing to market growth.

news.headline: Synaptics launches high-performance Adaptive MCUs for IoT, featuring three power levels to accelerate development.
news.summary: The SR-Series MCUs offer three different power levels and are designed to support Astra AI-Native hardware and open-source software. This design aims to speed up the creation of low-power, cognitive IoT devices.

news.headline: Genesis Energy, L.P. received $1.010 billion from Alkali Business sale, paid off $25 million in debt, and incurred 8.0% increment.
news.summary: Houston-based Genesis Energy LP (NYSE: GEL) provided an update on their recent receipt of approximately $1.010 billion in cash on February 28, 2025, from selling their Alkali Business. The company has used this cash to fully pay off its senior secured revolving credit facility, eliminating approximately $25 million in annual cash interest expenses. Additionally, Genesis has also made progress on addressing the remaining 8.0% of their outstanding debt. It highlights their strategic financial management and plans for future investments.

news.headline: Viamedia promotes Justin Johnston to SVP of Finance, leading financial strategy as the company expands beyond 100 video providers.
news.summary: Viamedia, a company based in Lexington, Kentucky, has recently appointed Justin Johnston as Senior Vice President of Finance. In his new role, Johnston will oversee the financial strategy of the company as it continues to grow and expand its services. This promotion comes as Viamedia surpasses 100 video service providers in its network.

news.headline: Fennec Pharma's 2024: PEDMARK® sales hit $29.6M for year, up 40%; Q4 saw $7.9M sales. Business update included.
news.summary: In the past year, PEDMARK® recorded impressive net product sales of $29.6 million, showcasing a significant 40% increase from the previous year. In the fourth quarter of 2024 alone, PEDMARK® generated net product sales of $7.9 million. These figures demonstrate strong growth and demand for PEDMARK® in the market.

news.headline: Perion increases share repurchase program to $125M from $75M, having already bought 5.2M shares for $46.8M.
news.summary: Perion Network Ltd., a prominent player in modern advertising technology, revealed an increase in its share repurchase program from $75 million to $125 million. The company's Board of Directors approved this $50 million expansion, with a total of 5.2 million shares already repurchased by December 31, 2024, amounting to $46.8 million. The company operates on both the NASDAQ and TASE markets under the ticker symbol PERI.

news.headline: QXO and Beacon Roofing discussing $11 billion acquisition, with QXO offering $124.35 per share in cash. Beacon postpones Investor Day.
news.summary: In Greenwich, Conn. and Herndon, Va., QXO, Inc. (NYSE: QXO) and Beacon Roofing Supply, Inc. (Nasdaq: BECN) have announced talks regarding a possible acquisition. The proposed deal would see QXO purchasing Beacon for $124.35 per share in cash, totaling around $11 billion. QXO is conducting standard due diligence on Beacon's operations, while both parties are working towards finalizing a formal agreement. As a result of these discussions, Beacon has decided to postpone its Investor Day event.

news.headline: Germany's AFD files urgent appeal with the constitutional court against the session of the outgoing parliament on Thursday - Court Spokesperson
The GEO Group modifies contract for 1,328-bed Karnes ICE Processing Center in Texas to house mixed populations.
news.summary: In Boca Raton, Florida, The GEO Group, Inc. revealed that U.S. Immigration and Customs Enforcement (ICE) has modified the contract for the 1,328-bed Karnes ICE Processing Center in Karnes City, Texas. Previously, the facility only housed adult males but will now accommodate mixed populations. GEO handles support services for ICE at the Center under an intergovernmental service agreement. GEO is listed on the New York Stock Exchange under the symbol GEO.
